ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

Off Calendar Jan-04-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Jan-04-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for Aida McGeachin.

Ms. Alavi stated that Mr. Schultz e-filed a petition for final distribtuion late on Friday, that it is pending and requested a continuance to allow the petition to post. Status on close of estate is continued to January 4, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

Off Calendar Nov-02-2020 Continued To Dec-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz, Esq., counsel for Aida McGeachin, Administrator (appearing by video conference).

At the Court's invitation, Mr. Schultz advises that as the Administrator of the estate is elderly and concerned about Covid exposure, she has been reticent to proceed, notwithstanding the otherwise simple nature of the estate. Further, since the Administrator is also the sole beneficiary of the estate, Mr. Schultz submits that the estate could be concluded by waiver of accounting as well which he hopes to submit in the near future.

After further discussion, the Court continues the matter to December 7, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If the Petition and waiver are on file by that date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
